title: Ben Gledhill
description: English rugby league and rugby union footballer
extract:
Ben Gledhill (born 18 September 1989) is an English rugby league footballer who played for Wakefield Trinity and Salford of Super League. He plays as a prop. Gledhill was an academy player at Castleford Tigers before joining Wakefield Trinity.
In 2013, he switched to playing rugby union for Darlington RFC, and then in April 2015 returned to play rugby league for Shaw Cross Sharks ARLFC.
